name: signed_shift_with_sign_extension
description: Code should include signed right shift of a signed operand where the operand's width is narrower than the expression result width, triggering implicit sign-extension before the shift operation.
snippet: assign out0 = reg_7 >> in2; // reg_7 is signed [9:0], out0 is [12:0]

name: variable_shift_amount
description: Code should include right shift operation where the shift amount is a dynamic value from a wire or input rather than a compile-time constant.
snippet: reg_7 >> in2  // in2 is an input wire, not a constant

name: implicit_sign_extension_in_assignment
description: Code should include assignment from a signed operand to a wider result type where the operand must be sign-extended to match the expression width before the operation.
